What is this tool?
The NCAA Similar Players finder identifies the most statistically comparable players in college basketball. Search any player from the 2024-25 or 2025-26 season and instantly find their 10 closest statistical matches. The algorithm is position-sensitive — Guards, Wings, Forwards and Bigs are compared using position-adjusted weights.

Position-Sensitive Cosine Similarity

Each player is represented as a weighted statistical vector. Guards receive higher weights for playmaking (AST%, AST/TO) and perimeter shooting (3P%, eFG%). Bigs receive higher weights for rebounding (TRB%, ORB%) and interior defense (BLK%). Wings and Forwards use balanced weights across all categories.

A similarity score of 100% means statistically identical profiles. Results are filtered by your selected season, position, class, tier, conference and minimum minutes.
